name: Good Hungarian Goulash
recipeIngredient: 7 oz Lean beef, cut into small pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. In the pressure cooker bottom, sauté onion and bacon; add garlic if desired.
2. Stir in paprika.
3. Add not quite 1 ¼ cup water.
4. Add beef, potatoes, salt, marjoram, and crushed caraway seeds.
5. Place the lid on and pressure-cook for 15 minutes.
Makes 4 servings.
